== Notes for [[Item:Q113166|Q113166]] ==

Not the son of https://www.geni.com/people/Desiderius-King-of-the-Lombards/6000000193773892822?through=6000000001734411153


----

Descripción Historica, Chronologica, y Genealogica, Civil, Politica, y Militar de la Serenissima Republica de Genova:

https://www.google.es/books/edition/Descripcion_historica_chronologica_y_gen/Cc0WAAAAQAAJ?hl=es&gbpv=1&dq=%22Monido+de+Gausona%22&pg=PA329&printsec=frontcover

Monarquia Española, Blason de su Nobleza:

https://www.google.es/books/edition/Monarquia_Espa%C3%B1ola_Blason_de_su_Nobleza/1utDAAAAcAAJ?hl=es&gbpv=1&dq=%22Fruela+I+de+Leon%22&pg=PA135&printsec=frontcover

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
